# GitAll
> Unified contribution heatmap viewer for GitHub and GitLab

GitAll (gitall.app) lets developers see their contribution squares
across multiple git platforms in one place. Enter usernames to view
side-by-side or integrated heatmaps. Free, no login required.

## Features

- View GitHub and GitLab contribution graphs side by side
- Merge contributions from multiple platforms into a single integrated heatmap
- No account, no OAuth, no login required
- Supports GitHub and GitLab; Bitbucket and Gitea/Forgejo coming soon

## Use cases

- Developers who contribute across multiple git platforms
- Recruiters and engineering managers who want a single view of developer activity
- Anyone who wants to compare their GitHub and GitLab contribution history

## Built by

Toastbyte Studios (https://toastbyte.studio)
